title: glyceria denticulata
intro: Glyceria denticulata, also known as toothed mannagrass or toothed glyceria, is a perennial wetland grass native to the northern hemisphere. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties and provide health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, glyceria denticulata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to calm digestive issues and promote relaxation.
